data.title: Reverse Each word in sentence
data.statement:
You must reverse each word in the given sentence and output all words in the original order.

Deal special characters as part of word and also reverse their position in output.

testCases.title: Test 1
testCases.testIn: A quick hungry brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
testCases.testOut: A kciuq yrgnuh nworb xof spmuj revo eht yzal god

testCases.title: Validator 1
testCases.testIn: A quick hungry brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
testCases.testOut: A kciuq yrgnuh nworb xof spmuj revo eht yzal god

testCases.title: Test 2
testCases.testIn: A room without books is like a body without a soul
testCases.testOut: A moor tuohtiw skoob si ekil a ydob tuohtiw a luos

testCases.title: Validator 2
testCases.testIn: A room without books is like a body without a soul
testCases.testOut: A moor tuohtiw skoob si ekil a ydob tuohtiw a luos

testCases.title: Test 3
testCases.testIn: I make mistakes, I am out of control and at times hard to handle
testCases.testOut: I ekam ,sekatsim I ma tuo fo lortnoc dna ta semit drah ot eldnah

testCases.title: Validator 3
testCases.testIn: I make mistakes, I am out of control and at times hard to handle
testCases.testOut: I ekam ,sekatsim I ma tuo fo lortnoc dna ta semit drah ot eldnah

testCases.title: Test 4
testCases.testIn: Be who you are and say what you feel, because those who mind don't matter, and those who matter don't mind.
testCases.testOut: eB ohw uoy era dna yas tahw uoy ,leef esuaceb esoht ohw dnim t'nod ,rettam dna esoht ohw rettam t'nod .dnim

testCases.title: Validator 4
testCases.testIn: Be who you are and say what you feel, because those who mind don't matter, and those who matter don't mind.
testCases.testOut: eB ohw uoy era dna yas tahw uoy ,leef esuaceb esoht ohw dnim t'nod ,rettam dna esoht ohw rettam t'nod .dnim

data.inputDescription: <<Line 1:>> A string [[sentence]] with each word separated by space
data.outputDescription: A single line containing the same order of words separated by space but the characters in each word is reversed

lastVersion.statementHTML:
Goal

You must reverse each word in the given sentence and output all words in the original order.

Deal special characters as part of word and also reverse their position in output.
Input
Line 1: A string sentence with each word separated by space
Output
A single line containing the same order of words separated by space but the characters in each word is reversed
Constraints
0 ≤ Length of string sentence ≤ 200
Example
Input
A quick hungry brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
Output
A kciuq yrgnuh nworb xof spmuj revo eht yzal god
